lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਚੋ ਸਚਾ ਤਿਚਰੁ ਜਾਪੀ ਜਾਪੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak saahib sacho sachaa tichar jaapee jaapai |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord and Master is the Truest of the True. While we meditate on Him, we see Him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਪੁਰਾਣਾ ਹੋਵੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਸੀਤਾ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਪਾਟੈ ॥
lines.translit: sach puraanaa hovai naahee seetaa kade na paattai |
lines.english: But the Truth does not grow old; and when it is stitched, it is never torn again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚ ਕੀ ਕਾਤੀ ਸਚੁ ਸਭੁ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sach kee kaatee sach sabh saar |
lines.english: The knife is Truth, and its steel is totally True.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੇ ਸਾਣ ਰਖਾਈ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabade saan rakhaaee laae |
lines.english: It is sharpened on the grindstone of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਾੜਤ ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਅਪਰ ਅਪਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: ghaarrat tis kee apar apaar |
lines.english: Its workmanship is incomparably beautiful.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਕੀ ਥੇਕੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gun kee thekai vich samaae |
lines.english: It is placed in the scabbard of virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਇ ਹਲਾਲੁ ਲਗੈ ਹਕਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: hoe halaal lagai hak jaae |
lines.english: One who is slaughtered in this ritualistic way, will be attached to the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਹੂ ਲਬੁ ਨਿਕਥਾ ਵੇਖੁ ॥
lines.translit: lohoo lab nikathaa vekh |
lines.english: then the blood of greed will spill out.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਦਾ ਕੁਠਾ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੇਖੁ ॥
lines.translit: tis daa kutthaa hovai sekh |
lines.english: If the Shaykh is killed with that,

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਰਿ ਦੀਦਾਰਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak dar deedaar samaae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, at the Lord's door, he is absorbed into His Blessed Vision. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਰਬੁ ਨ ਕੀਜੈ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਮਤੁ ਸਿਰਿ ਆਵੈ ਭਾਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: garab na keejai naanakaa mat sir aavai bhaar |3|
lines.english: But don't be too proud; O Nanak, you may fall head first to the ground. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਮਰਿ ਕਟਾਰਾ ਬੰਕੁੜਾ ਬੰਕੇ ਕਾ ਅਸਵਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: kamar kattaaraa bankurraa banke kaa asavaar |
lines.english: A beautiful dagger hangs by your waist, and you ride such a beautiful horse.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਧਿਆਇਨਿ ਸੇ ਸਚੇ ਜਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਖਰਚੁ ਧਨੁ ਪਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: sach dhiaaein se sache jin har kharach dhan palai |
lines.english: Meditating on the True Lord, they become truthful; they carry in their robes the supplies of the Lord's wealth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਜੋ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਚਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: so satasangat sabad milai jo guramukh chalai |
lines.english: They alone walk as Gurmukh, who receive the Shabad in the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਤਨ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਭਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: ratan beechaar man vasiaa gur kai sabad bhalai |
lines.english: They enshrine the jewel of contemplation within their minds, and the most sublime Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਸੋਹਨਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਦੇ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਅਚਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat sohan gun gaavade guramat achalai |
lines.english: The devotees look beautiful, singing the Praises of the Lord; following the Guru's Teachings, they become stable and unchanging.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਦਾ ਆਪੇ ਦੇਇ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: aape mel milaaeidaa aape dee vaddiaaee |19|
lines.english: He Himself unites in His Union; He Himself grants glorious greatness. ||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਕੋਇ ਨਿਰਾਸਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa andar sabh ko koe niraasaa hoe |
lines.english: Everyone is filled with hope; hardly anyone is free of hope.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੋ ਮਰਿ ਜੀਵਿਆ ਸਹਿਲਾ ਆਇਆ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak jo mar jeeviaa sahilaa aaeaa soe |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, blessed is the birth of one, who remains dead while yet alive. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਕਰੇ ਏਹ ਬਪੁੜੀ ਜਾਂ ਭੋੁਲਾਏ ਸੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kiaa kare eeh bapurree jaan bhoulaae soe |2|
lines.english: What can this poor being do? The Lord Himself creates confusion. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਕਿਛੁ ਆਸਾ ਹਥਿ ਹੈ ਕੇਉ ਨਿਰਾਸਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naa kichh aasaa hath hai keo niraasaa hoe |
lines.english: Nothing is in the hands of hope. How can one become free of hope?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਆਰਾਧੇ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਸੋਇ ਜਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: saas saas aaraadhe niramal soe jan |
lines.english: That humble being is immaculate, who worships the Lord with each and every breath.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਦਾਤਾਰ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਏਹੁ ਧਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: prabh daataa daataar nihachal ehu dhan |
lines.english: God is the Great Giver of givers. His wealth is permanent and unchanging.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਜੀਵਣੁ ਸੰਸਾਰ ਸਚੇ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: dhrig jeevan sansaar sache naam bin |
lines.english: Cursed is the life in this world, without the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਅਗਮੁ ਰਸਨਾ ਏਕੁ ਭਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: antarajaamee agam rasanaa ek bhan |
lines.english: With your tongue, vibrate the One Inaccessible Lord, the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਰਬਤਿ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਈ ॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: rav rahiaa sarabat naanak bal jaaee |20|
lines.english: He is all-pervading everywhere. Nanak is a sacrifice to Him. ||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਵਰ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਹੀਰਾ ਮੋਤੀ ਸੋ ਹੰਸਾ ਕਾ ਖਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: saravar andar heeraa motee so hansaa kaa khaanaa |
lines.english: The diamonds are in this lake; they are the food of the swans.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਵਰ ਹੰਸ ਧੁਰੇ ਹੀ ਮੇਲਾ ਖਸਮੈ ਏਵੈ ਭਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: saravar hans dhure hee melaa khasamai evai bhaanaa |
lines.english: The union between the lake of the True Guru, and the swan of the soul, was pre-ordained from the very beginning, by the Pleasure of the Lord's Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਨਾ ਰਿਜਕੁ ਨ ਪਇਓ ਓਥੈ ਓਨੑਾ ਹੋਰੋ ਖਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: onaa rijak na peo othai onaa horo khaanaa |
lines.english: They do not find their food there; their food is different.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਗੁਲਾ ਕਾਗੁ ਨ ਰਹਈ ਸਰਵਰਿ ਜੇ ਹੋਵੈ ਅਤਿ ਸਿਆਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: bagulaa kaag na rahee saravar je hovai at siaanaa |
lines.english: The cranes and the ravens may be very wise, but they do not remain in this lake.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨ ਕੌ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਜਿਨਾ ਧੁਰੇ ਪੈਯਾ ਪਰਵਾਣਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak tin kau satigur miliaa jinaa dhure paiyaa paravaanaa |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, they alone meet the True Guru, who are so pre-destined by the Lord's Command. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਕਮਾਣੈ ਸਚੋ ਪਾਈਐ ਕੂੜੈ ਕੂੜਾ ਮਾਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: sach kamaanai sacho paaeeai koorrai koorraa maanaa |
lines.english: Practicing Truth, the True Lord is found. False is the pride of the false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋਈ ਸੇਵੀਐ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਜੋ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak soee seveeai sadaa sadaa jo dee |
lines.english: O Nanak, serve Him, who gives to you forever and ever.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਉਜਲਾ ਜੇ ਕੋ ਚਿਤਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: saahib meraa ujalaa je ko chit karee |
lines.english: My Lord and Master is immaculate, as are those who think of Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋਈ ਸੇਵੀਐ ਜਿਤੁ ਸੇਵਿਐ ਦੁਖੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak soee seveeai jit seviai dukh jaae |
lines.english: O Nanak, serve Him; by serving Him, sorrow is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਗੁਣ ਵੰਞਨਿ ਗੁਣ ਰਵਹਿ ਮਨਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਵਸੈ ਆਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: avagun vanyan gun raveh man sukh vasai aae |2|
lines.english: Faults and demerits vanish, and virtues take their place; peace comes to dwell in the mind. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਆਪਿ ਤਾੜੀ ਲਾਈਅਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape aap varatadaa aap taarree laaeean |
lines.english: He Himself is all-pervading; He Himself is absorbed in the profound state of Samaadhi.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਉਪਦੇਸਦਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਤੀਆਈਅਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape hee upadesadaa guramukh pateeaeean |
lines.english: He Himself instructs; the Gurmukh is satisfied and fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਆਪੇ ਉਝੜਿ ਪਾਇਅਨੁ ਇਕਿ ਭਗਤੀ ਲਾਇਅਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: eik aape ujharr paaeian ik bhagatee laaeian |
lines.english: Some, He causes to wander in the wilderness, while others are committed to His devotional worship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਆਪਿ ਬੁਝਾਏ ਸੋ ਬੁਝਸੀ ਆਪੇ ਨਾਇ ਲਾਈਅਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: jis aap bujhaae so bujhasee aape naae laaeean |
lines.english: He alone understands, whom the Lord causes to understand; He Himself attaches mortals to His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਸਚੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੨੧॥੧॥ ਸੁਧੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak naam dhiaaeeai sachee vaddiaaee |21|1| sudh |
lines.english: O Nanak, meditating on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, true greatness is obtained. ||21||1|| Sudh||
